name: whatsapp
description: Send and receive WhatsApp messages via Twilio (no SDK — pure REST)

tools.name: whatsapp_send
tools.planner_hint: Use to send a WhatsApp message. Put recipient and message in description. Format: to=+91XXXXXXXXXX body=your message here

tools.name: whatsapp_list
tools.planner_hint: Use to check recent incoming WhatsApp messages.
